Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count

Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, LDL cholesterol, chloride, and platelet distribution width, suggesting suboptimal glycemic and lipid control, possible mild hyperchloremia, and increased platelet size variability. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, blood counts, and lipid profile, are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of cardiovascular risk management and diabetes monitoring.

text.div: Provider Organization: Ospedale Civico Renzetti Lanciano
